ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree, neural network) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being run */,
  "cumulative_threshold" REAL /* Cumulative threshold value used in the model */,
  "cloglog_threshold" REAL /* Cloglog threshold value used in the model */,
  "training_omission_rate" REAL /* Training omission rate of the model */,
  "test_omission_rate" REAL /* Test omission rate of the model */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "configuration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the model configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model configuration being evaluated */,
  "fractional_predicted_area" REAL /* Fractional predicted area of the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used to assess model performance */,
  "evaluation_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the model performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "dataset_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the model */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the dataset in the model (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model configuration being run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user running the model */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the model run started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the model run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the prediction */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used to assess model performance */,
  "evaluation_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the model was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being collaborated on */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
